name: agent-command-locus
description: Agent Command Locus — phosphor-lattice spatial multi-agent canvas

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run typecheck -w @acl/shared && npm run typecheck -w @acl/core && npm run build -w @acl/adapters && npm run typecheck -w @acl/adapters
scripts.test: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run test -w @acl/core && npm run build -w @acl/adapters && npm run test -w @acl/adapters
scripts.build: npm run build -w @acl/shared && npm run build -w @acl/core && npm run build -w @acl/adapters

author: Agent Command Locus contributors
